qualitative_examples.real_report:
BREAST COMPOSITION: fibro fatty and glandular breast parenchyma (ACR B)

FINDINGS: a small well defined soft opacity with internal popcorn calcifications seen in upper quadrant of breast suggest benign lesion - calcified fibroadenoma most likely (BIRADS 2). 

few foci of microcalcifications seen anterior to above lesion. 

skin, nipple, and pectoral muscle appear normal. 

no significant axillary adenopathy seen. 

BIRADS: 2

qualitative_examples.dmid_only:
Breast Composition:
fibro glandular breast parenchyma (ACR C).

BIRADS: 4c

Findings:
A large well defined irregular soft opacity with spiculated margin seen in the upper quadrant of the breast suggests high suspicious malignant 
lesion (BIRADS 4c).
No abnormal calcification seen within the lesion. 
Skin and nipple appear normal.

qualitative_examples.real_report:
BREAST COMPOSITION: fibro fatty and glandular breast parenchyma (ACR B)

FINDINGS: a small well defined soft opacity with internal popcorn and rim calcifications seen in inner quadrant of breast suggest benign lesion - calcified fibroadenoma most likely (BIRADS 2). 

few foci of microcalcifications seen anterior to above lesion. 

skin and nipple appear normal. 

BIRADS: 2
